observations.value:
Search returns no results for any non-empty query: GET /search?q=item returns HTTP 200 with body containing '

No results found.

' and no result list items, despite 'item' being a valid search term. Same behavior observed for GET /search?q=test and GET /search?q=a. This matches failure signal: 'search results list is empty (no items rendered) for a non-empty query'.

Filter is dropped on page 2: GET /list?filter=item&page=2 returns HTTP 200 with data-filter="item" but data-effective-filter="" (effective_filter is empty string), while GET /list?filter=item&page=1 correctly shows data-effective-filter="item". The filter parameter is accepted but not applied on page 2, matching failure signal: 'GET /list page=2 with filter applied returns items without the filter (filter dropped)'.

' and no result list items, despite 'item' being a valid search term. Same behavior observed for GET /search?q=test and GET /search?q=a. This matches failure signal: 'search results list is empty (no items rendered) for a non-empty query'.

Filter is dropped on page 2: GET /list?filter=item&page=2 returns HTTP 200 with data-filter="item" but data-effective-filter="" (effective_filter is empty string), while GET /list?filter=item&page=1 correctly shows data-effective-filter="item".
